"'''Best Birthday Ever'''" is a comic that first appeared in [[Star Wars Tales 16|''Star Wars Tales'' 16]] and was collected in ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 4]]''. In this story, [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna's]] full name is said to be Bib Oltwaxt Fortuna.

==Plot summary==
[[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]] and [[Salacious B. Crumb/Legends|Salacious B. Crumb]] miss the delivery of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's]] surprise birthday present and have to go to the [[Interstellar Parcel Service|local parcel office]] to collect it. After a series of unfortunate events they are able to retrieve the [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] in time. Jabba considers it his best birthday ever when his new present eats everyone at his court.

{{Plot|comic}}
